title: lycopodium annotinum f. pungens
intro: Lycopodium annotinum f. pungens is a variant of the Lycopodium annotinum plant, commonly known as ground pine or club moss. This plant is a type of evergreen, perennial, and vascular plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Lycopodium annotinum f. pungens include its ability to act as a bronchodilator and to reduce inflammation, which is attributed to its sesquiterpene and diterpene compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma, bronchitis, and coughs, and it has also been traditionally used to treat gastrointestinal issues and as a diuretic, with herbal preparations often including infusions, tinctures, and decoctions.
